name: Kaltura, Inc.
description: Kaltura, Inc. is a leading provider of video technology solutions, offering a comprehensive Video Experience Cloud that powers live and on-demand video for thousands of organizations globally. Founded in 2006, the company specializes in AI-infused video tools for enterprises, media companies, and educational institutions, facilitating virtual classrooms, webinars, cloud TV, and internal communications. By providing a flexible, open, and scalable platform, Kaltura enables its customers to create, manage, and monetize engaging video experiences that drive collaboration, learning, and business growth across diverse industries and digital environments.
